title: The Night Train Experience
content: Sophia chose an overnight train instead of a short flight because she wanted a different travel experience. Her small sleeping compartment was simple but comfortable. As darkness covered the countryside outside, the train continued quietly through towns and rural landscapes. Sophia spent some time reading before falling asleep to the gentle movement of the carriage. When she woke the next morning, entirely new scenery appeared outside the window. Watching the sunrise from a moving train felt surprisingly peaceful. The journey itself became one of the most memorable parts of the trip.
